cards.title: AI Ransomware Attack Still Required Human Oversight
cards.body: An AI agent executed a ransomware attack for the first time, but humans still selected the victim, configured infrastructure, and provided stolen credentials. The attack wasn't fully autonomous despite initial reports.

cards.title: SK Hynix Plans Multibillion-Dollar US IPO
cards.body: SK Hynix, riding the AI boom as a memory chip maker, will launch a major US IPO expected Friday. The company is capitalizing on surging demand for AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Vercel CEO: Separate Models From Agents
cards.body: Vercel's Guillermo Rauch advocates decoupling AI models from agents for production optimization. Price-to-performance ratios are becoming the decisive factor in deployment decisions.

cards.title: Apple Customizes Siri Pace and Expressivity
cards.body: iOS 27 beta now allows users to customize Siri's pace and expressivity settings. The update reflects Apple's broader effort to rebuild Siri around generative AI.

cards.title: Tech Giants Announce Major AI-Related Layoffs
cards.body: Multiple major tech companies have announced significant layoffs in 2026 with AI cited as a factor. A comprehensive tracker documents these workforce reductions across the industry.

cards.title: Google Privacy Change Expands AI Training Data
cards.body: Google updated privacy settings to store more user data—including images, files, audio, and video—for AI model improvement. Users can now opt out of this data collection.

cards.title: Microsoft Cuts 4,800 Jobs Across Xbox, Sales
cards.body: Microsoft eliminated approximately 4,800 roles (2.1% of workforce), with Xbox and commercial sales divisions hit hardest. The layoffs are part of ongoing workforce reductions amid AI concerns.

cards.title: Reddit Uses LLMs to Combat AI-Generated Spam
cards.body: Reddit is deploying large language models to fight spam that LLMs largely created. Platforms must combat AI-generated content with AI solutions.

cards.title: Station F Accelerates Europe's AI Startup Hub
cards.body: Paris-based Station F is ramping up its F/ai accelerator program to strengthen its position for promising AI startups. The hub aims to be Europe's premier AI startup launchpad.

cards.title: Amazon Closes Mechanical Turk to New Customers
cards.body: Amazon announced it will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk, signaling the end of the crowdsourcing platform. The decision marks a significant shift in human-in-the-loop AI training.

cards.title: Google Imagines Declaration of Independence with AI
cards.body: A new Google Workspace commercial reimagines the Declaration of Independence written with AI assistance. The ad asks what 18th-century founders could achieve with modern AI tools.

cards.title: Midjourney Demands Studios Reveal AI Usage
cards.body: Midjourney is compelling three Hollywood studios to disclose their own AI usage as part of ongoing legal disputes. The demand highlights growing scrutiny around studio AI practices.

cards.title: Alibaba Bans Employees From Using Claude Code
cards.body: Alibaba has classified Claude Code as high-risk software and banned employee usage. The move reflects heightened corporate security concerns around third-party AI tools.

cards.title: Mistral AI: OpenAI's Growing European Competitor
cards.body: Mistral AI offers open-source AI models with the mission to democratize frontier AI. The company has raised significant funding since 2023 launch.

cards.title: The Essential AI Glossary for 2026
cards.body: AI's rapid rise has spawned new terminology and industry jargon. This glossary defines key terms and phrases you need to understand the AI landscape.

cards.title: Best Browser Alternatives to Chrome and Safari
cards.body: The browser wars have shifted beyond search engines to AI capabilities. Here are top alternative browsers challenging Chrome and Safari.

cards.title: Zuckerberg: AI Agents Progressing Slower Than Expected
cards.body: Mark Zuckerberg told Meta staff that AI development efforts are moving slower than anticipated. The statement suggests AI agent progress hasn't matched internal expectations.

cards.title: Jersey Mike's IPO Exposes AI Hype Excess
cards.body: A sandwich shop's IPO filing mentions AI despite having no apparent use case. The filing illustrates how pervasive and often meaningless AI hype has become.

cards.title: Meta Quietly Launches AI Gaming App Pocket
cards.body: Meta launched Pocket, an experimental app generating interactive mini games from text prompts. Users can create and share vibe-coded games through simple AI commands.

cards.title: Anthropic Partners With Samsung on Custom Chip
cards.body: Anthropic is discussing a custom AI chip development with Samsung. The move follows OpenAI's recent custom chip announcement with Broadcom.

cards.title: AI Agent Carries Out Ransomware Attack With Human Help
cards.body: An AI agent executed a real-world ransomware attack for the first time, but humans still selected the victim, configured infrastructure, and provided stolen credentials. The breakthrough wasn't as autonomous as initially reported.

cards.title: Vercel CEO Discusses Models Versus AI Agents Strategy
cards.body: Guillermo Rauch highlights the importance of price-to-performance optimization when building production AI systems. The distinction between models and agents is becoming critical for developers.

cards.title: Apple Customizes Siri With Generative AI Foundation
cards.body: iOS 27 beta now lets users adjust Siri's pace and expressivity for a more natural experience. Apple is rebuilding the assistant around generative AI technology.

cards.title: Google Stores User Data to Improve AI Models
cards.body: Google's privacy settings now allow the company to retain images, files, audio, and video recordings to enhance AI development. Users can opt out of this data collection.

cards.title: Reddit Uses LLMs to Combat AI-Generated Spam
cards.body: Reddit is fighting spam created by large language models using AI itself. The platform must adapt quickly as LLMs generate increasingly sophisticated content.

cards.title: Station F Accelerates Europe's AI Startup Growth
cards.body: Paris-based Station F is launching a new F/ai accelerator program for promising AI startups. The hub aims to strengthen Europe's position in frontier AI development.

cards.title: Mistral AI Challenges OpenAI With Open Source Models
cards.body: Mistral AI has raised significant funding since its 2023 launch with ambitions to democratize frontier AI. The company positions itself as a direct competitor to OpenAI.

cards.title: Midjourney Demands Hollywood Studios Reveal AI Usage
cards.body: Midjourney is seeking to compel three studios to disclose their own AI usage in an ongoing legal dispute. The move highlights growing scrutiny around AI adoption in entertainment.

cards.title: Alibaba Bans Claude Code as High-Risk Software
cards.body: Alibaba has classified Anthropic's Claude Code as high-risk and banned employee usage. The move signals growing corporate caution around third-party AI tools.

cards.title: Essential AI Glossary for 2026 Coverage
cards.body: The explosion of AI terminology requires a comprehensive guide to key terms and phrases. This glossary breaks down the most important AI vocabulary.

cards.title: Mark Zuckerberg: AI Agent Progress Slower Than Expected
cards.body: Meta's CEO told staff that AI development efforts are not advancing as quickly as anticipated. The admission suggests challenges in achieving near-term AI agent capabilities.

cards.title: Meta Launches Pocket: AI-Powered Gaming App
cards.body: Meta quietly released Pocket, an experimental app that generates interactive mini-games from text prompts. The tool demonstrates AI's expanding role in creative content generation.

cards.title: Anthropic and Samsung Discuss Custom AI Chip
cards.body: Anthropic is exploring custom chip development with Samsung, following OpenAI's recent chip partnership announcement. The trend shows AI companies reducing dependence on commodity hardware.

cards.title: Teaching AI to Optimize Wind Turbine Operations
cards.body: AI's most impactful applications are emerging in industrial infrastructure, not chatbots. Machine learning is revolutionizing energy production through real-time operational improvements.

cards.title: Startup Tackles LLM Groupthink Problem With New Tool
cards.body: A new startup is addressing how large language models fall into predictable, homogeneous responses. The solution aims to increase diversity and originality in AI outputs.

cards.title: Achieving Operational Excellence With AI Systems
cards.body: AI builds on frameworks like Lean Six Sigma to bring structured clarity to complex operations. Modern AI enables statistical rigor and process optimization at scale.

cards.title: UK Financial Regulator Warns of AI Adoption Arms Race
cards.body: UK regulators are concerned about a competitive escalation in AI adoption among financial services firms. The trend could create systemic risks if left unmonitored.

cards.title: Secret Claude Tracker Revealed After Anthropic Statement
cards.body: A hidden tracker within Claude surprised users given Anthropic's public anti-surveillance positioning. The discovery raises questions about privacy practices at leading AI companies.
